note: Daycare responds to a waitlist application with a spot offer — daycare_application_response.

input.rawContent:
From: admin@maplegrove-childcare.ca
Subject: A spot has opened for your application

Good news — a spot has opened in our infant room for September. To accept, please confirm and submit the $200 deposit within 5 business days, or the spot goes to the next family on the waitlist.
